                   }
                 }
 
+                @Reusable
+                @Component
+                struct SendFailedButtonComponent {
+                  @State mmsItem: mmsListType = {} as mmsListType
+                  @State contactsNum: number = 0
+                  onSendFailedButtonClick: () => void = () => {}
+
+                  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+                    this.mmsItem = params.mmsItem
+                    this.contactsNum = params.contactsNum
+                    this.onSendFailedButtonClick = params.onSendFailedButtonClick
+                  }
+
+                  build() {
+                    SendFailedButton({
+                      mmsItem: this.mmsItem,
+                      contactsNum: this.contactsNum,
+                      onSendFailedButtonClick: this.onSendFailedButtonClick
+                    })
+                  }
+                }
+
+                @Reusable
+                @Component
+                struct MmsContentComponent {
+                  @State isTouch: boolean = false
+                  @State conversationCtrl: ConversationController = {} as ConversationController
+                  @State mmsInfo: mmsInfo = {} as mmsInfo
+                  @State item: Mms[] = []
+                  @State contentType: string = ''
+                  @State itemIndex: number = 0
+                  delConversionController: CustomDialogController = {} as CustomDialogController
+                  @State showMMContentPicker: boolean = false
+                  @State content: string = ''
+                  @State mmsItem: mmsListType = {} as mmsListType
+                  @State scrollEndIndex: number = 0
+                  @State scrollStartIndex: number = 0
+                  changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: () => void = () => {}
+
+                  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+                    this.isTouch = params.isTouch
+                    this.conversationCtrl = params.conversationCtrl
+                    this.mmsInfo = params.mmsInfo
+                    this.item = params.item
+                    this.contentType = params.contentType
+                    this.itemIndex = params.itemIndex
+                    this.delConversionController = params.delConversionController
+                    this.showMMContentPicker = params.showMMContentPicker
+                    this.content = params.content
+                    this.mmsItem = params.mmsItem
+                    this.scrollEndIndex = params.scrollEndIndex
+                    this.scrollStartIndex = params.scrollStartIndex
+                    this.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool = params.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool
+                  }
+
+                  build() {
+                    MmsContent({
+                      isTouch: this.isTouch,
+                      conversationCtrl: this.conversationCtrl,
+                      mmsInfo: this.mmsInfo,
+                      item: this.item,
+                      contentType: this.contentType,
+                      bubbleTextDirection: 'right',
+                      itemIndex: this.itemIndex,
+                      delConversionController: this.delConversionController,
+                      showMMContentPicker: this.showMMContentPicker,
+                      content: this.content,
+                      mmsItem: this.mmsItem,
+                      scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+                      scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+                      changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: this.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool,
+                      mmsContentBackgroundColor: $r('app.color.brand'),
+                    }).id('mms_content_right_id')
+                  }
+                }
+
+                @Reusable
+                @Component
+                struct BubbleTextComponent {
+                  @State conversationCtrl: ConversationController = {} as ConversationController
+                  @State content: string = ''
+                  @State detectResContent: string = ''
+                  @State isRcs: boolean = false
+                  @State itemIndex: number = 0
+                  @State mmsItem: mmsListType = {} as mmsListType
+                  delConversionController: CustomDialogController = {} as CustomDialogController
+                  @State showMMContentPicker: boolean = false
+                  @State currentScreenWidth: number = 0
+                  @State isMsm: boolean = false
+                  controller: TextAreaController = {} as TextAreaController
+                  @State isPermissionDenied: boolean = false
+                  @State isScrolling: boolean = false
+                  @State isGeometryAnimate: boolean = false
+                  @State scrollEndIndex: number = 0
+                  @State scrollStartIndex: number = 0
+                  @State isLastItem: boolean = false
+                  changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: () => void = () => {}
+                  @State smsType: number = 0
+                  changeFocusAble: () => void = () => {}
+
+                  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+                    this.conversationCtrl = params.conversationCtrl
+                    this.content = params.content
+                    this.detectResContent = params.detectResContent
+                    this.isRcs = params.isRcs
+                    this.itemIndex = params.itemIndex
+                    this.mmsItem = params.mmsItem
+                    this.delConversionController = params.delConversionController
+                    this.showMMContentPicker = params.showMMContentPicker
+                    this.currentScreenWidth = params.currentScreenWidth
+                    this.isMsm = params.isMsm
+                    this.controller = params.controller
+                    this.isPermissionDenied = params.isPermissionDenied
+                    this.isScrolling = params.isScrolling
+                    this.isGeometryAnimate = params.isGeometryAnimate
+                    this.scrollEndIndex = params.scrollEndIndex
+                    this.scrollStartIndex = params.scrollStartIndex
+                    this.isLastItem = params.isLastItem
+                    this.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool = params.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool
+                    this.smsType = params.smsType
+                    this.changeFocusAble = params.changeFocusAble
+                  }
+
+                  build() {
+                    BubbleText({
+                      conversationCtrl: this.conversationCtrl,
+                      bubbleTextBorderRadius: [2, 16],
+                      bubbleTextDirection: 'right',
+                      content: this.content,
+                      detectResContent: this.detectResContent,
+                      isRcs: this.isRcs,
+                      bubbleTextBackgroundColor: $r('app.color.brand'),
+                      itemIndex: this.itemIndex,
+                      mmsItem: this.mmsItem,
+                      delConversionController: this.delConversionController,
+                      showMMContentPicker: this.showMMContentPicker,
+                      currentScreenWidth: this.currentScreenWidth,
+                      isMsm: this.isMsm,
+                      controller: this.controller,
+                      isPermissionDenied: this.isPermissionDenied,
+                      isScrolling: this.isScrolling,
+                      isGeometryAnimate: this.isGeometryAnimate,
+                      scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+                      scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+                      isLastItem: this.isLastItem,
+                      changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: this.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool,
+                      smsType: this.smsType,
+                      changeFocusAble: this.changeFocusAble
+                    })
+                  }
+                }
+
+                @Reusable
+                @Component
+                struct MessageBubbleComponent {
+                  @State item: mmsListType = {} as mmsListType
+                  @State index: number = 0
+                  @State mConversationCtrl: ConversationController = {} as ConversationController
+                  @State isTouch: boolean = false
+                  @State showMMContentPicker: boolean = false
+                  delConversionController: CustomDialogController = {} as CustomDialogController
+                  @State scrollEndIndex: number = 0
+                  @State scrollStartIndex: number = 0
+                  @State currentScreenWidth: number = 0
+                  controller: TextAreaController = {} as TextAreaController
+                  @State isPermissionDenied: boolean = false
+                  @State isScrolling: boolean = false
+                  @State isSendingAnimate: boolean = false
+                  @State needRefreshTime: boolean = false
+                  @State textDirection: string = ''
+                  @State isResendRcsInfo: boolean = false
+                  @State resendStateIsRcs: boolean = false
+                  resendDialogController: CustomDialogController = {} as CustomDialogController
+                  @State conListCtrl: ConversationListController = {} as ConversationListController
+                  changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: () => void = () => {}
+
+                  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+                    this.item = params.item
+                    this.index = params.index
+                    this.mConversationCtrl = params.mConversationCtrl
+                    this.isTouch = params.isTouch
+                    this.showMMContentPicker = params.showMMContentPicker
+                    this.delConversionController = params.delConversionController
+                    this.scrollEndIndex = params.scrollEndIndex
+                    this.scrollStartIndex = params.scrollStartIndex
+                    this.currentScreenWidth = params.currentScreenWidth
+                    this.controller = params.controller
+                    this.isPermissionDenied = params.isPermissionDenied
+                    this.isScrolling = params.isScrolling
+                    this.isSendingAnimate = params.isSendingAnimate
+                    this.needRefreshTime = params.needRefreshTime
+                    this.textDirection = params.textDirection
+                    this.isResendRcsInfo = params.isResendRcsInfo
+                    this.resendStateIsRcs = params.resendStateIsRcs
+                    this.resendDialogController = params.resendDialogController
+                    this.conListCtrl = params.conListCtrl
+                    this.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool = params.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool
+                  }
+
+                  build() {
+                    Column() {
+                      Row() {
+                        if (this.item.sendStatus == commonData.int.RCS_SEND_CANCELED ||
+                          (this.mConversationCtrl.contactsNum == 1 &&
+                            this.item.sendStatus == commonData.int.SEND_MESSAGE_FAILED) ||
+                          (this.mConversationCtrl.contactsNum > 1 &&
+                            this.item.failuresNumber > 0 &&
+                            this.item.completeNumber ==
+                            this.mConversationCtrl.contactsNum)) {
+                          SendFailedButtonComponent({
+                            mmsItem: this.item,
+                            contactsNum: this.mConversationCtrl.contactsNum,
+                            onSendFailedButtonClick: () => {
+                              if (this.mConversationCtrl.canResendMms(this.item.isMsm)) {
+                                this.mConversationCtrl.setResendIndex(this.index);
+                                this.isResendRcsInfo = false;
+                                this.resendStateIsRcs = false;
+                                if (!this.conListCtrl.isOsAccountConstraintEnabled) {
+                                  this.resendDialogController.open();
+                                }
+                                DotUtil.getInstance()
+                                  .reportEvent(dotNoNeedParmas,
+                                    dotCommon.eventName.SENDING_FAILED_AND_RESEND);
+                              }
+                            }
+                          }).margin({ end: LengthMetrics.vp(8) })
+                            .reuseId('send_failed_' + this.item.id)
+                        }
+                        Column() {
+                          if (this.item.isMsm) {
+                            MmsContentComponent({
+                              isTouch: this.isTouch,
+                              conversationCtrl: this.mConversationCtrl,
+                              mmsInfo: this.item as mmsInfo,
+                              item: this.item.mmsSource,
+                              contentType: this.item.contentType,
+                              itemIndex: this.index,
+                              delConversionController: this.delConversionController,
+                              showMMContentPicker: this.showMMContentPicker,
+                              content: this.item.content,
+                              mmsItem: this.item,
+                              scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+                              scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+                              changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: this.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool
+                            }).reuseId('mms_content_' + this.item.id)
+                          }
+                          if (!this.item.isMsm || (this.item.msgTitle && this.item.content == '') ||
+                            (this.item.isMsm &&
+                              this.item.content !== '' &&
+                              this.item.msgShowType !== common.MESSAGE_SHOW_TYPE.MAP &&
+                              !MmsUtil.isSlideType(this.item.contentType))) {
+                            BubbleTextComponent({
+                              conversationCtrl: this.mConversationCtrl,
+                              content: this.item.content,
+                              detectResContent: this.item.detectResContent,
+                              isRcs: this.item.isRcs,
+                              itemIndex: this.index,
+                              mmsItem: this.item,
+                              delConversionController: this.delConversionController,
+                              showMMContentPicker: this.showMMContentPicker,
+                              currentScreenWidth: this.currentScreenWidth,
+                              isMsm: this.item.isMsm,
+                              controller: this.controller,
+                              isPermissionDenied: this.isPermissionDenied,
+                              isScrolling: this.isScrolling,
+                              isGeometryAnimate: this.isSendingAnimate,
+                              scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+                              scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+                              isLastItem: this.index == this.mConversationCtrl.mmsList.length - 1,
+                              changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: this.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool,
+                              smsType: this.mConversationCtrl.smsType,
+                              changeFocusAble: () => {}
+                            }).reuseId('bubble_text_' + this.item.id)
+                          }
+                        }
+                        .accessibilityLevel('no')
+                        .id(this.item.id.toString())
+                        .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.End)
+                        .onClick(() => {
+                          let bubleTextFlag: boolean = (!this.item?.isRcs &&
+                            (!this.item.isMsm || (this.item.msgTitle && this.item.content == '') ||
+                              (this.item.isMsm &&
+                                this.item.content !== '' &&
+                                !MmsUtil.isSlideType(this.item.contentType)))) ||
+                            this.item.rcsType === commonData.ENHANCED_INFO_ITEM_TYPE.TEXT;
+                          if (this.mConversationCtrl.isSelectStatus &&
+                            ConversationDataSource.getInstance().mmsList[this.index] && !bubleTextFlag) {
+                            this.mConversationCtrl.multiSelectMmsMsg(this.index);
+                            this.mConversationCtrl.listCheckBoxChange(this.index,
+                              !ConversationDataSource.getInstance().mmsList[this.index].isCbChecked);
+                            this.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool();
+                          }
+                        })
+                      }
+                      .justifyContent(FlexAlign.End)
+                      .alignItems(VerticalAlign.Center)
+                    }
+                  }
+                }
+
                 ListItem() {
                   Column() {
                     MessageTypeTitleAndCalenderDate({
@@ -3591,130 +3753,26 @@
